settings.title: Happiness Guaranteed or Money Back
settings.description: We're so committed to your satisfaction that after 6 months, if you're not happy simply return it or swap for a new one.

settings.title: Sustainably Sourced & Handmade in The UK
settings.description: Every Klawford bed is handcrafted in the UK using sustainably sourced materials.

settings.title: Customisable Options for Your Specific Needs
settings.description: Choose your colour, size, storage type, headboard and base to create your perfect bed.

settings.title: Infinite Restless Movements
settings.description: The responsive design absorbs motion for a calm and undisturbed night's sleep.

settings.heading: Loved in Homes Just Like Yours

settings.title: Select Product
settings.description: Choose your desired Klawford product, selecting the colour, size and storage options that suit you best.

settings.title: Easy Payment
settings.description: Pay securely online with Klarna, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and more — interest-free options available.

settings.title: 2 Man Delivery
settings.description: Our 2-man team delivers to your room and assembles everything. White glove service included.

settings.title: Quality Pocket Spring
settings.description: Premium springs provide targeted support to relieve pressure points for a superior night's sleep.

settings.title: Promote Good Form and Posture
settings.description: Supports each part of your spine equally to keep your posture aligned throughout the night.

settings.title: Prevent Allergen Reaction
settings.description: Hypoallergenic materials so everyone can enjoy a deep, undisturbed sleep.

settings.title: Infinite Restless Movements
settings.description: Responsive springs absorb motion and reduce partner disturbance at night.

settings.question: Do your products conform to UK fire safety regulations?
settings.answer: Yes, all of our products are fully compliant with UK fire safety regulations, including BS 7177 for mattresses and related furniture.

settings.question: How long does delivery take once I've placed my order?
settings.answer: Standard delivery is 7–14 working days. Express delivery options are available at checkout.

settings.question: Can I choose my delivery date and time?
settings.answer: Yes! Once your order is dispatched, our delivery partner will contact you to arrange a convenient date and time.

settings.question: Can I track my order on my phone?
settings.answer: Absolutely. You'll receive an email with a tracking link once your order is dispatched.

settings.question: What is the 60 night risk-free trial?
settings.answer: If you're not completely happy within the first 60 nights, contact us for a full refund or replacement — no questions asked.

settings.question: What does the 5-year warranty cover?
settings.answer: Our 5-year warranty covers all manufacturing defects, structural issues and material faults.

settings.question: Can I buy monthly or through financing options?
settings.answer: Yes! We offer 0% interest financing through Klarna and other providers at checkout.
